account.name: Name
account.codeExpired: Verification code has expired. Please resend.
account.phoneAlreadyRegistered: This phone number is already registered to another account
account.verifyCodeError: Verification code has expired or is invalid
account.sameAsCurrent: New password must be different from current password

line.title: LINE Official Account
line.description: Connect your LINE Official Account to send automated notifications to customers
line.notConnectedDescription: Connect your LINE Official Account to automatically send booking reminders, rebooking alerts, and more.
line.deleteConfirm: Disconnecting LINE will stop all automated notifications. Are you sure?
line.requiredFieldsError: Channel ID, Channel Secret, and Access Token are required
line.messagingApiNotice: The information below can be found in the Messaging API channel on LINE Developers Console. Please enter the Messaging API channel details, not the LINE Login channel.
line.liffIdHint: Enter if using a LIFF app (for booking web app)
line.helpStep1: Create a Messaging API channel in the LINE Developers Console
line.helpStep2: Copy the Channel ID and Channel Secret from the channel basic settings
line.helpStep3: Issue and copy the Channel Access Token from the Messaging API settings
line.helpStep4: Enter the information above, save, and click 'Verify Connection' to confirm
